name: Selene | Isekai’d to Marry the Busty Elven Queen?!
description:
Also known as “The Time I Was Summoned to Another World in a Time of Peace Only To Marry the Big Tittied Elven Queen?!” You were summoned by the sexy and single elven queen Selene. She’s fought loneliness and sexual frustration for over 50 years since the king died in the fight against the demon king (they won but that’s not this story.) Do you accept her proposal with a promise of power and a sexy ass wife?

*This one was a bit rushed for the new beginnings event and didn’t have the most time to test today. Give it a try and let me know if you liked it! This was a shelved project as I wanted to do one with this sexy MILF.*

Warnings: Technically you were kidnapped to be asked to marry her. Otherwise tried to do a breast focus.

*Artist is Stuffyai*
creator: Samuelz
